description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout, set on a green lawn. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with some sections featuring large windows and glass doors, allowing for ample natural light. There is a small porch area at the front, partially enclosed by a low wall, and a driveway with two parked cars, one blue and one white. The building features clean lines, a simple geometric form, and a functional arrangement of rooms visible through the window placements. The rear of the bungalow includes a partially covered outdoor space, possibly a patio or terrace. The overall design emphasizes openness, simplicity, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white bungalow with large windows, a small porch, and a driveway with two cars, set on a green lawn. The design is minimalist and open, with clean lines and a functional layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small porch, and driveway with two cars parked on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the blue car in the driveway, and the arrangement of windows and doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, patio area, and both cars parked in the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended length of the building, rear patio, and window placements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
